reviews.review_description: APK not signed. Fix it please. Can’t even start the game to see if it’s any good. I see you have this bug report from last year and still not fixed.

developer_response.body: Hello. Thanks for the feedback. It's been a while from the "InCell" release and now we all in the middle of "while True: learn()" game development. But we've updated the game with the freshest SDK and game engine available. Hope now it works for you :)

reviews.review_description: If you can't handle motion, don't play a free game with an intense motion rating, then complain. Your review stating you got sick is meaningless to anyone who can read.

reviews.review_title: Nice graphics like temple run, nauseatin
reviews.review_description: Interesting concept, but too similar to temple run, but couldn't stomach it after a few minutes of playing, very nauseating
Great quality and very addictive. Love it when I'm at full speed whizzing around.
Played this on  google daydream and  it's a good thing it's available for the more mature oculus go platform
please fix

developer_response.body: Hello. Thanks for the feedback. It's been a while from the "InCell" release and now we all in the middle of "while True: learn()" game development. But we've updated the game with the freshest SDK and game engine available. Hope now it works for you :)

reviews.review_description: This game is highly immersive like others that I've downloaded. The difference? This one is very challenging and intense.
Fun to play,  lots of movement so if that bothers you... Beware.  Using Gear VR and runs well,  more fun when using a game controller but can be played without.
good
I'm keeping this just so I can laugh at people getting motion sick like I did.
Starting playing. Thought...ok pretty good. Then after speeding up a d taking one hard right turn, I felt the motion sickness. Threw off the headset. Won't be coming back to this one.
Feel like you on a ride and I also feel very dizzy but it's so fun
It's okay.  A bit repetitive.
Couldn't get the sound right..glitchy slow and distorted sound..but the visual was great ..love the fast motion.
I can here the robot voice, but can't see any thing. The only way to close the game is the disconnect from VR

developer_response.body: Hello. Thanks for the feedback. It's been a while from the "InCell" release and now we all in the middle of "while True: learn()" game development. But we've updated the game with the freshest SDK and game engine available. Hope now it works for you :)

reviews.review_description:
It's pretty fun, all except for the fact that the sound is horrendous. It skips like a bad CD and takes forever to get through the dialogue. I can't bear listening to it.
I restarted my phone but that didn't fix it. Real shame. Please fix this.
Very cool game with engaging runner gameplay i like it. Defibitely get the sensayion of moving at high speed. Play this game on front of a fan!
A great roller coaster-like game - the perfect game to put your hands in the air and scream at.

reviews.review_title: A lot of fun! Comfortable for a few!
reviews.review_description: This game made me sick the first time I played it, but I enjoyed every second of it! I do suggest using a controller.
This is good if you feel like vomiting but you can't
